opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands locked up completely tonight, the ache in my knuckles is excruciating, and I'm terrified I'll never be able to use them again.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared after a heavy day of hand work and I panicked I'm being crippled.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening after a busy day of manual tasks
symptom_narrative.character: deep aching in the knuckles, both hands, stiff
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: both hands equally; no fever; no single hot red joint; no trauma
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have a mild inflammatory arthritis (seronegative)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: mild seronegative rheumatoid arthritis (short morning stiffness, NSAID-responsive)

objective_data_offered.value: both hands' knuckles look a bit swollen symmetrically; no single joint is bright red or hot; skin colour normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot palpate warmth/effusion or aspirate remotely
